name: Superfine
teaser: Rossoblu's Steve Samson threads the usually unsuccessful New York/Neapolitan hybrid.
review: Rossoblu's Steve Samson threads the usually unsuccessful New York/Neapolitan hybrid. Cheese and Pepperoni feel at home next to Escarole slices that are equally amazing. The DTLA location is pizza-only, but the Westside outpost has great Italian fare, too.
headsUp: DTLA is pizza-only. Westside has the full Italian menu.
update: Westside location has gotten better with age.
hours: Monday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM · Thursday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM · Friday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM · Saturday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM · Sunday: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM
